chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 237 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter 1. For orders on MA No.2971/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.2972/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.2971/2021 (R/Surety) 21-06-2021 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant / surety has filed this application for return of surety on the ground that the applicants / accused, who were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 24-04-2019 which was later on confirmed on the same terms and conditions vide order dated 08-07-2019, have been acquitted of the charge by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Kandiaro vide judgment dated 29-09-2020; copy of said judgment is placed on record. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Deputy Prosecutor General for the State, present in the Court in other matters, waives notice and accords no objection to the grant of this application. Accordingly, present application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
